name: C-17 legacy mode (--tree without --catalog) archives the source-folder file to _archived/ per the G-9 chain
command: mkdir -p tree/ns && printf '  id: custom-framework\n' > tree/ns/custom-framework.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" --id custom-framework --tree tree && [ -f tree/ns/_archived/custom-framework.yaml ] && [ ! -f tree/ns/custom-framework.yaml ] && echo archived 1>&2
